title: Coerce dry_run parameter strings to booleans in export migration procedure

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing robust boolean coercion for dry_run so CLI --set values like 'true'/'false' and 1/0 behave correctly.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented dry_run coercion helper: accepts bool, numeric, and common string forms (true/false, yes/no, 1/0). Procedure now computes dry_run via to_bool(params.dry_run,false). Validated YAML parse + yaml loader test.
